do_if.value: $hi32 ge 0 and $hi32 lt 4294967296L and $lo32 ge 0 and $lo32 lt 4294967296L
$wireHi? and $wireLo? and $wireHi != null and $wireLo != null and $wireHi ge 0 and $wireHi lt 4294967296L and $wireLo ge 0 and $wireLo lt 4294967296L
$result == '' and $template? and $template != null and typeof $template != datatype.npctemplate

set_value.name: $tplWire
set_value.exact: if $crewTemplateWire? and $crewTemplateWire != '' then $crewTemplateWire else (if $pilotRow.$LastSarCrewTemplateWire? and $pilotRow.$LastSarCrewTemplateWire != '' then $pilotRow.$LastSarCrewTemplateWire else '')

debug_text.text: '[GT Info Menu] Received request for pilot data from UI'
'[GT Info Menu] GT systems initialized but no data yet'
'[GT Info Menu] Config flags: AutoTraining=' + $autoTraining + ', AutoRepair=' + $autoRepair + ', AutoResupply=' + $autoResupply + ', PilotRenamingEnabled=' + $pilotRenamingEnabled
'[GT Info Menu] Found ' + $shipsKeysCount + ' ships in registry'

do_elseif.value: $ovRow.$ShipID? and $ovRow.$ShipID != '' and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.keys.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT Info Menu] Sending data for ' + $pilotCount + ' pilots to Lua UI'

'[GT Info Menu] PilotIdMap entries prepared=' + $gtPilotIdMapCount + ' (stable=' + $gtPilotIdMapFromStable + ', idcode=' + $gtPilotIdMapFromPilotIdcode + ', seed/ref=' + $gtPilotIdMapFromPilotRef + ')'
